description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent red gable roof accented by green trim. The main structure features a large covered porch supported by white columns, accessible via a staircase leading up from the ground level. The exterior walls are primarily dark, contrasted by white window frames and structural supports, giving the house a modern yet traditional appearance. There are multiple rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the house is accompanied by two smaller outbuildings with matching roof styles. The property sits on a light-colored rectangular base, suggesting a paved or concrete foundation. The overall design is functional, with clear entry points, outdoor stair access, and sheltered areas.
description: A two-story house with a red gable roof, dark exterior walls, white trim, a covered porch, and two matching outbuildings on a light base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch, staircase, and entryway beneath the large red roof.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the house, the porch, and both outbuildings with their matching roofs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, multiple windows, and the spatial arrangement of the outbuildings.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the dark exterior wall, white trim, and the proximity of the smaller outbuilding.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, white columns, and a simple door beneath an overhanging roof.
